title: aidriven-lock.json
description: Schema for the project-scope and user-scope lockfile (FR-032, SC-009). The project lockfile MUST NOT include timestamps; the user lockfile MAY.

version.description: Lockfile schema version. Migrations on bump MUST preserve data or warn — never silently discard entries.

skills.description: Skills keyed by name. Serialized with sorted keys for deterministic VCS diffs.

source.description: Source repository identifier. v1 only supports the trusted source.

sourceCommitSha.description: Full 40-char commit SHA the files were fetched from.

computedHash.description: SHA-256 of all installed file contents sorted by relative path (FR-030).

targets.description: AI targets this skill is installed for. MUST be sorted alphabetically for determinism.

lastInstalledAt.description: Optional. Allowed in the user lockfile only. The project lockfile MUST omit this field.
